problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
